abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: Incorporeal
abilities.text: Reduce damage dealt to this model by 1. Damage from (magic) actions may not be reduced this way.

actions.name: One for the Road
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This attack has a raise value of 3.

triggers.name: Sharpened Brilliance
triggers.text: Discard a friendly Brilliance token from either this model or the target. When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: The Light Inside
triggers.text: This model or the target gains a Brilliance token.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Drawn to Brilliance
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: Move the target up to 6" toward a model with a friendly Brilliance token.

triggers.name: Burned by the Light
triggers.text: When resolving, the target may move through models. Deal 1 damage to enemy models moved through this way.

triggers.name: "Do You Fold?"
triggers.text: Target must either discard a card or gain a Brilliance token.

triggers.name: Hopeless Revelation
triggers.text: The target gains an Insight token.

actions.name: Shining Example
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may remove a friendly Brilliance token from itself.
actions.effects: Move this model up to 4". If a Brilliance token was removed, it may increase the distance moved by +2".
